name: souroldgeezer
description: Claude Code plugins by Sour Old Geezer — skills and subagents for code auditing, review, and development workflows.

plugins.name: souroldgeezer-audit
plugins.description: Rubric-driven audits for DevSecOps posture and test quality, with per-stack extensions and matching subagents.

plugins.name: souroldgeezer-design
plugins.description: Reference-driven design for modern web UIs and serverless HTTP APIs — build, review, and look up responsive interfaces (WCAG 2.2 AA, i18n, Core Web Vitals) and serverless APIs (security, contract discipline, reliability, observability) across Azure Functions .NET, Cosmos DB, and Blob Storage, with composable per-stack extensions and matching subagents.
